top_signals.title: Energy secretary says U.S. has ended Iran's ability to close Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Some 72 ships loaded with 19 million barrels of oil have passed through Hormuz in the past 24 hours, Energy Secretary Chris Wright said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea stock volatility hits record high amid AI doubts
top_signals.summary: Shares of chipmakers Samsung and SK Hynix gyrate in choppy trading
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: House passes affordable housing bill, sends it to Trump's desk
top_signals.summary: The House on Tuesday gave final passage to a bill aimed at lowering costs for homebuyers and reining in private equity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: This is not AI. It’s intentionally, painstakingly human-made art.
top_signals.summary: Yoshitoshi Kanemaki's handcarved sculptures have a digital aesthetic, but they are firmly anchored in three-dimensional space.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Lithium’s next demand wave extends beyond EV batteries
top_signals.summary: Emerging technologies could add significant lithium demand by 2050, though EVs remain the dominant growth driver.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Keiko Fujimori: Peru’s biggest political loser poised to win election
top_signals.summary: With almost all the ballots counted, Fujimori held 50.12% of the vote, a margin of just over 43,000 over her leftist rival Roberto Sanchez, according to electoral authorities.
